label: scam
text: Dear Customer, your UPI ID has been blocked due to suspicious activity. Click this link to verify and reactivate: http://upi-verify.xyz/reactivate

label: scam
text: ALERT! Rs.49,999 has been debited from your account via UPI. If not done by you, call 9876543210 immediately to block transaction.

label: scam
text: Dear Sir/Madam, your PhonePe/GPay account will be suspended in 24 hours. Complete KYC by sending Aadhaar copy to this number: 8765432109

label: scam
text: You have received a cashback of Rs.500 on your last UPI transaction! To claim, enter your UPI PIN at http://cashback-claim.in

label: scam
text: RBI NOTICE: Your UPI transactions are being monitored for illegal activity. Pay penalty of Rs.2000 within 24 hrs or face legal action. UPI: penalty@rbi

label: scam
text: Aapke UPI account mein Rs.15,000 aaye hain. Confirm karne ke liye ye link kholein: http://upi-confirm.xyz. Jaldi karein warna refund ho jayega.

label: scam
text: URGENT: Your PAN card has been linked to multiple bank accounts. Update your KYC immediately at http://pan-update.co.in or your accounts will be frozen.

label: scam
text: SBI Alert: Your account KYC is expiring today. Submit Aadhaar + PAN to avoid account suspension. Upload here: http://sbi-kyc-update.com

label: scam
text: Dear HDFC Customer, your KYC verification is pending. Your account will be deactivated in 48 hours. Complete now: http://hdfc-kyc.online

label: scam
text: Paytm KYC Expired! Your Paytm wallet will be blocked permanently. Update Aadhaar details now on http://paytm-kyc-renew.in

label: scam
text: ICICI Bank: Aapka KYC update nahi hua hai. Abhi apna Aadhaar number 9988776655 par WhatsApp karein warna account band ho jayega.

label: scam
text: CONGRATULATIONS!!! You have won Rs.25,00,000 in the Jio Lucky Draw 2026! To claim your prize, send your Aadhaar, PAN, and bank details to jiodraw2026@gmail.com

label: scam
text: Dear User, your mobile number has been selected for KBC (Kaun Banega Crorepati) jackpot of Rs.50 Lakh! Contact manager Amit Sharma at 7654321098 to claim.

label: scam
text: Amazon Gift Card Alert! You have won a FREE Amazon voucher worth Rs.10,000. Click here to redeem NOW: http://amazon-gift-india.xyz

label: scam
text: Flipkart Big Billion Day Winner! Aapne jeeta hai Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra! Courier charges Rs.999 pay karein UPI par: flipkart@ybl

label: scam
text: This is SBI customer care. We are updating our system. Please share the OTP sent to your registered mobile number for verification. Do not share with anyone else.

label: scam
text: Dear customer, a refund of Rs.3,499 is pending. To process, please share the 6-digit OTP received on your mobile. Call 1800XXXXXXX for assistance.

label: scam
text: Aapke account mein ek galat transaction hua hai. Cancel karne ke liye apna OTP batayein. RBI helpline se call kar rahe hain.

label: scam
text: BREAKING: Modi government is giving Rs.6,000 to every citizen under PM Kisan Yojana extension! Register now before March 31: http://pmkisan-bonus.in. Forward to 10 people to confirm registration!

label: scam
text: WhatsApp is shutting down if you don't forward this message to 20 contacts! Also get WhatsApp Gold premium version FREE! Download: http://whatsapp-gold.apk

label: scam
text: RATION CARD holders will receive Rs.1500 monthly from April 2026! Apply online: http://ration-scheme.gov.in.xyz. Share this message with all relatives!

label: scam
text: Petrol price will be Rs.50/litre from tomorrow as per new government order! Save this message. Also fill this form for fuel subsidy: http://fuel-subsidy-india.com

label: scam
text: TATA Group is hiring 5000 freshers! Salary Rs.45,000/month. No interview needed. Pay Rs.500 registration fee at http://tata-careers-india.com

label: scam
text: Work from home opportunity! Earn Rs.30,000-50,000 per month. Simple data entry. Join WhatsApp group: https://chat.whatsapp.com/xyz123. Deposit Rs.1,000 as security.

label: scam
text: Indian Railway Recruitment 2026: 10th Pass vacancy for 15,000 posts. Apply now and pay Rs.250 exam fee online: http://railway-recruitment-board.in

label: scam
text: Amazon/Flipkart product review job! Rate products and earn Rs.5000 daily. Contact HR: +91-9876543210. Training fee Rs.2000 (refundable).

label: scam
text: GUARANTEED 30% returns monthly! Invest Rs.10,000 in our crypto trading platform and earn Rs.3,00,000 in 30 days. Limited seats. Join Telegram: t.me/cryptoking_india

label: scam
text: IPO Alert! Invest Rs.5,000 in pre-IPO shares of Reliance Digital. 500% returns guaranteed. Share market expert advice. Pay now: invest@ybl

label: scam
text: SIP scheme by RBI - Get Rs.1 crore in 5 years by investing Rs.500/month! This is NOT a normal SIP. Register on http://rbi-sip-scheme.co.in

label: scam
text: This is Cyber Crime Branch, Delhi Police. Your Aadhaar number has been used for money laundering. Case FIR No. 2026/CR/4521. Contact Inspector Verma at 9988776655 immediately or arrest warrant will be issued.

label: scam
text: CBI Notice: Your bank account is linked to a hawala racket investigation. Freeze order pending. Transfer Rs.50,000 to safe account immediately. Contact Agent ID: CBI-2026-7890.

label: scam
text: TRAI (Telecom Authority) Alert: Your mobile number will be disconnected in 2 hours for sending spam. Press 1 to speak to officer. Penalty Rs.25,000.

label: scam
text: Income Tax Department: Aapke PAN par Rs.8,50,000 ka undisclosed income mila hai. 72 ghante mein jawab dein ya prosecution hogi. Helpline: 9876540000

label: scam
text: Your Flipkart order #FK2026789 is held at customs. Pay customs duty of Rs.499 to release. Pay here: http://flipkart-customs.xyz

label: scam
text: India Post: Your parcel (tracking: IN123456789) could not be delivered. Pay Rs.25 redelivery charge at http://indiapost-redeliver.com to reschedule.

text: Amazon Delivery Failed! Your package is at nearest warehouse. Verify address and pay Rs.49 handling fee: http://amz-delivery-india.in

label: scam
text: IT Department: You are eligible for income tax refund of Rs.15,600. Claim now by providing bank details at http://incometax-refund.gov.in.xyz

label: scam
text: GST Registration cancelled! Your GSTIN has been deactivated for non-compliance. Re-register within 7 days: http://gst-reactivate.co.in. Penalty of Rs.50,000 otherwise.

label: scam
text: Form 16 Tax Notice: You owe Rs.1,25,000 in unpaid taxes for FY 2025-26. Pay immediately via UPI to avoid 300% penalty. UPI: taxdept@sbi
